Edit the existing raster digital sculpture.
Primary subject: the recognizable vehicle in the edit target.
Silhouette: preserve the outer contour, pose, camera, crop, and key proportions.
Geometry: preserve the existing faceted planar geometry.
Materials: keep the matte obsidian body and satin gold accents.
Lighting: preserve the broad soft key light and restrained gold highlights.
Composition: keep one isolated full object and negative space.
Background: keep the pure black background.
Fidelity: preserve subject, silhouette, and composition fidelity.
Input role: edit target.
Output: square PNG raster with no text or watermark.

Change: remove the visible floor shadow.
Keep unchanged: subject identity, silhouette, camera, crop, geometry, gold placement, lighting, and background.
May vary: only pixels required to remove the floor shadow.
Remove: floor shadow.
Must not appear: environment, pedestal, extra colors, stone texture, text, logo, or watermark.
